scene_description:
**Foreground:**  
- A light brown dirt road with visible tire tracks dominates the lower portion of the image, extending toward the background.  
- On the **right edge of the road** (near the grassy area), two green rectangular dumpsters are positioned side-by-side; the left dumpster features a faint white symbol (not legible as text).  

**Mid-foreground:**  
- On the **left side of the road**, a wooden utility pole supports multiple parallel horizontal wires (3–4 visible wires). The pole is situated in a grassy area.  
- On the **right side of the road**, a second wooden utility pole also supports the same horizontal wires. Adjacent to this pole (slightly behind the dumpsters), a small rectangular sign with a dark background (black or dark green) is mounted on the pole; no legible text is visible on the sign.  

**Background:**  
- On the **left side** (beyond the first utility pole), a low, single-story building with a flat roof and gray concrete/brick facade is partially obscured by greenery.  
- On the **right side** (further back), a larger single-story building with a flat roof and gray walls features a small window and is situated near the grassy area.  
- The road extends straight into the distance, flanked by dense green vegetation. To the **left**, thick foliage and trees cover the area; to the **right**, grassy fields with scattered trees and litter patches (white debris) are visible.  
- In the far background, more low-lying structures and trees are present, with the sky (clear with light wispy clouds) occupying the upper portion of the image.  

**Road surface & markings:**  
- The road is an unpaved dirt surface with no painted lines (white/yellow) or lane markings. The driving side is undetermined due to the absence of visible traffic or lane divisions.  

**Infrastructure details:**  
- Utility poles: Wooden, with horizontal crossbars supporting multiple horizontal wires (no transformers/insulators visible).  
- No bollards, street lamps, traffic lights, fire hydrants, guardrails, or fences are present.  

**Buildings & architecture:**  
- All visible structures are single-story with flat roofs. The left building has a plain facade (no visible windows); the right building has a gray wall with a small window.  

**Vegetation & terrain:**  
- Dense green grass lines both sides of the road.  
- Numerous trees with green foliage (deciduous) are present in the background, with no visible tree types (palm, coniferous) distinct enough for classification.  
- The terrain is flat, with no elevation changes.  

**Text & signs:**  
- No legible text is visible on any signs, buildings, or objects. The small sign on the right utility pole has a dark background, but text is unreadable. The dumpster’s white symbol is not translatable as text.  

**Vehicles & plates:**  
- No vehicles are present.
